get.description: Get hashtag chunk of top medias. Returns a list of Media objects.

parameters.name: name

schema.description:
Please make sure to use a clean hashtag without any special symbols. 

**Good one**: love, sea, dog, 공구 

**Bad one**: #dog, sea_., tanjung.., #공구.
schema.title: Name

parameters.description:
Please make sure to use a clean hashtag without any special symbols. 

**Good one**: love, sea, dog, 공구 

**Bad one**: #dog, sea_., tanjung.., #공구.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
items, max_id = await cl.hashtag_medias_top_chunk_v1(name="love", max_id=None)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
items_list = []
max_id = None
while True:
    items, max_id = cl.hashtag_medias_top_chunk_v1("love", max_id=max_id)
    items_list.extend(items)
    if not max_id:
        break
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Get hashtag object by name. Returns a Hashtag object.

parameters.name: name
